title: Dota Mod
description: Artifacts, tools, weapons and more from the Dota Universe!
body:
**Dota Mod** adds artifacts, weapons, tools, mobs, runes and other things from the well-known Dota Universe!
The mod has a number of commands to configure its functions. Type /dotaHelp in-game to learn more.

**Dota Mod 2.0** and higher requires **[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**

**Dota Mod 2.1** and higher requires **[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)**

This project is not a continuation/rebirth of the old Dota Items Mod.

**[Made with MCreator](https://mcreator.net/modification/88138/dota-items)**


**Recommended mods for better experience:**

- **[Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)**

**Supported Minecraft versions:**
- 1.18.2 (Discontinued)
- 1.19.2
- 1.19.4
- 1.20.1

**Supported languages:**
- English
- Russian
